description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: Linux, MacOS, and Windows. Each job should check out the repository, then perform specific build and test steps. The Linux job should run on ubuntu-18.04, install dependencies, and build with gmake2 and make. The MacOS job should run on macOS-10.14 and build and test with premake5 and make. The Windows job should run on windows-2019, generate a project with GenerateVS19.bat, and build with MSBuild.
